prose:
Method provenance block:
Property: HOMO–LUMO (frontier-orbital) gap, energy units eV.
Level of theory: B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`, density-fitted) as implemented in PySCF.
Geometry provenance: single-point calculation on user-supplied Cartesian coordinates (file /​home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz); no geometry optimisation performed (notation DFT//input-xyz).
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge = 0, multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software/backend: PySCF (engine invoked through chemkit frontier-orbitals skill; CLI shown below).
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings were reported by the engine. Result passes all integrity checks (integrity.trustworthy = true).

Headline result
HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398131 eV
(HOMO at −7.2525992 eV; LUMO at −1.112786 eV)

Reproducibility
CLI invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpvdfee9bc/live.json`
The run wrote a live log while executing (frontier_YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.out in the working directory); you can inspect it with `tail -f` or open it directly for the full SCF transcript and any backend messages. The result JSON is at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpvdfee9bc/live.json`.

No engine warnings were produced.

This value is a computed quantity (provenance: computed).
